title: ζ_K(-3) Connection to A₅ and E₈
description: Established remarkable connection: ζ_K(-3) = 1/60 = 1/|A₅| = 1/C₂(E₈), linking the zeta function of ℚ(√5) to the alternating group A₅ and the E₈ Lie algebra.

title: BE-FD Duality with Golden Ratio Fixed Points
description: Discovered that the Bose-Einstein distribution has fixed point at φ while the Fermi-Dirac distribution has fixed point at 1/φ, revealing a fundamental duality.

title: Strong Log-Concavity of Riemann-Jacobi Kernel
description: Proved strong log-concavity property of the Riemann-Jacobi kernel. Submitted to Experimental Mathematics for peer review.

title: RH for ℚ(√5) Implies RH (Theorem)
description: Established rigorous theorem: if the Riemann Hypothesis holds for the number field ℚ(√5), then it holds for the classical Riemann zeta function.

title: The Golden Chain
description: Fundamental insight connecting the chain: φ → ℚ(√5) → ζ_K → ζ → primes → everything. This chain reveals how the golden ratio connects to the deepest structures in number theory.

title: Seven Perspectives Supporting RH
description: Verified seven independent numerical perspectives supporting the Riemann Hypothesis to 10,000 zeros, providing comprehensive computational evidence.

title: Mahler Measures Connection to Special ζ Values
description: Connected Mahler measures of the Bertin-Touafek polynomial family to special values of the Riemann zeta function, revealing deep arithmetic structure.

title: Lattice Green Functions in d≥4
description: Proved Domb number decomposition for lattice Green functions in dimensions four and higher, establishing exact expressions.

title: Exact Stokes Multipliers for Anharmonic Oscillators
description: Computed exact Stokes multipliers for x²ᴹ anharmonic oscillators with M ranging from 2 to 11, providing precise analytical tools for quantum mechanical systems.

title: Prime Structure of Electromagnetic Constants
description: Identified prime number structure in electromagnetic constants using the PSLQ algorithm, revealing hidden arithmetic patterns.

title: Zeta Reformulation of Wyler's Formula
description: Reformulated Wyler's geometric formula for the fine-structure constant via the zeta function: α⁻¹ = 360/φ² = 3/(ζ(−3)·φ²), connecting geometry to number theory.
